EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The permission to edit blog post "{object.name}" is granted to the group "{object.account.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The permission to view blog post "{object.name}" is granted to the group "{object.account.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The permission to edit blog post "{object.name}" is revoked from the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The permission to view blog post "{object.name}" is revoked from the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The permission to edit blog post "{object.name}" is revoked from the group "{object.account.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The permission to edit blog post "{object.name}" is granted to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The permission to view blog post "{object.name}" is granted to the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The permission to view blog post "{object.name}" is revoked from the group "{object.account.group}" on host {event_src.host}
